tests: const song = new Song({ artist: 'Beatles' }); const err = song.validateSync(); expect(err.errors.title).toBeDefined();
const song2 = new Song({ title: 'Imagine' }); const err2 = song2.validateSync(); expect(err2.errors.artist).toBeDefined();
const song3 = new Song({ title: 'Imagine', artist: 'John Lennon' }); expect(song3.validateSync()).toBeUndefined(); expect(song3.duration).toBe(0);
